subtitle: Shareable telemetry dashboard inputs for quaternion extraction and quality checks.
key_findings: Per-frame orientation quaternions were extracted successfully with ExifTool alone.
Quaternion coverage matches the full 4003-frame clip, with unit norm and smooth temporal behavior.
The LRF sidecar provides a low-resolution stitched ERP path for fast validation before full export work.
This is enough evidence to move on to body-frame ERP validation and operator stability checks.
report_notes: The committed JSON includes all 4003 per-frame telemetry samples used by the dashboard charts and quality checks.
Raw ffprobe/exiftool dumps and the original report scratch files remain local under ignored paths.
Detailed narrative context still lives in local repo working docs that are not part of this initial shared bundle.
